title: Destruction
doc_html:
§129. Destruction

            A viable in vitro fertilized human embryo is a juridical person which shall not be intentionally destroyed by any natural or other juridical person or through the actions of any other person.

            Acts 1986, No. 964, §1; Acts 2025, No. 116, §1.
doc_text:
§129.  Destruction
A viable in vitro fertilized human embryo is a juridical person which shall not be
intentionally destroyed by any natural or other juridical person or through the actions of any
other person.
Acts 1986, No. 964, §1; Acts 2025, No. 116, §1.
